title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: 'Football Is Freedom': Bob Marley Inspires Jamaica's Kits Ahead of World Cup
items.description: Jamaica's newest football kits celebrate both Bob Marley's life and the rich musical tradition of the island nation.

items.title: Phillies Manager Rob Thomson 'Proud' Nick Castellanos Admitted Beer Incident
items.description: Phillies manager Rob Thomson said he was "proud" of the recently released Nick Castellanos for owning his dugout beer incident.

items.title: Texas Coach Vic Schaefer Rips Team After Vanderbilt Loss: 'We Have No Heart'
items.description: Texas coach Vic Schaefer called the Longhorns "soft" after they lost to Vanderbilt on their home floor, 86-70.

items.title: Travis Kelce Playing, Taylor Swift Rumors Spike Pebble Beach Ticket Sales $60K
items.description: Travis Kelce is playing in the Pebble Beach Pro-am, and there was a spike on ticket sales amid rumors his fiancé Taylor Swift would attend.

items.title: Justin Verlander on Tigers' Reunion: 'I Thought There Was a Chance I Come Back'
items.description: Now back with the Detroit Tigers, Justin Verlander discussed on Thursday how he felt a reunion was always possible.

items.title: Paul announces NBA retirement after 21 seasons

items.title: Grateful Naumov: 'Hope I made everyone proud'
items.description: The last conversation that Maxim Naumov had with his parents was about following in their footsteps to the Olympics.

items.title: Phillies manager 'proud' of Castellanos admission
